1	"""
2	Multi-provider authentication system for Hermes Agent.
3	
4	Supports OAuth device code flows (Nous Portal, future: OpenAI Codex) and
5	traditional API key providers (OpenRouter, custom endpoints). Auth state
6	is persisted in ~/.hermes/auth.json with cross-process file locking.
7	
8	Architecture:
9	- ProviderConfig registry defines known OAuth providers
10	- Auth store (auth.json) holds per-provider credential state
11	- resolve_provider() picks the active provider via priority chain
12	- resolve_*_runtime_credentials() handles token refresh and key minting
13	- logout_command() is the CLI entry point for clearing auth
14	"""
15	
16	from __future__ import annotations
17	
18	import json
19	import logging
20	import os
21	import shutil
22	import shlex
23	import stat
24	import base64
25	import hashlib
26	import subprocess
27	import threading
28	import time
29	import uuid
30	import webbrowser
31	from contextlib import contextmanager
32	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
33	from datetime import datetime, timezone
34	from pathlib import Path
35	from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
36	
37	import httpx
38	import yaml
39	
40	from hermes_cli.config import get_hermes_home, get_config_path
41	from hermes_constants import OPENROUTER_BASE_URL
42	
43	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
44	
45	try:
46	    import fcntl
47	except Exception:
48	    fcntl = None
49	try:
50	    import msvcrt
51	except Exception:
52	    msvcrt = None
53	
54	# =============================================================================
55	# Constants
56	# =============================================================================
57	
58	AUTH_STORE_VERSION = 1
59	AUTH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 15.0
60	
61	# Nous Portal defaults
62	DEFAULT_NOUS_PORTAL_URL = "https://portal.nousresearch.com"
63	DEFAULT_NOUS_INFERENCE_URL = "https://inference-api.nousresearch.com/v1"
64	DEFAULT_NOUS_CLIENT_ID = "hermes-cli"
65	DEFAULT_NOUS_SCOPE = "inference:mint_agent_key"
66	DEFAULT_AGENT_KEY_MIN_TTL_SECONDS = 30 * 60  # 30 minutes
67	ACCESS_TOKEN_REFRESH_SKEW_SECONDS = 120       # refresh 2 min before expiry
68	DEVICE_AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL_CAP_SECONDS = 1     # poll at most every 1s
69	DEFAULT_CODEX_BASE_URL = "https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex"
70	DEFAULT_GITHUB_MODELS_BASE_URL = "https://api.githubcopilot.com"
71	DEFAULT_COPILOT_ACP_BASE_URL = "acp://copilot"
72	CODEX_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID = "app_EMoamEEZ73f0CkXaXp7hrann"
73	CODEX_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL = "https://auth.openai.com/oauth/token"
74	CODEX_ACCESS_TOKEN_REFRESH_SKEW_SECONDS = 120
75	
76	
77	# =============================================================================
78	# Provider Registry
79	# =============================================================================
80	
81	@dataclass
82	class ProviderConfig:
83	    """Describes a known inference provider."""
84	    id: str
85	    name: str
86	    auth_type: str  # "oauth_device_code", "oauth_external", or "api_key"
87	    portal_base_url: str = ""
88	    inference_base_url: str = ""
89	    client_id: str = ""
90	    scope: str = ""
91	    extra: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
92	    # For API-key providers: env vars to check (in priority order)
93	    api_key_env_vars: tuple = ()
94	    # Optional env var for base URL override
95	    base_url_env_var: str = ""
96	
97	
98	PROVIDER_REGISTRY: Dict[str, ProviderConfig] = {
99	    "nous": ProviderConfig(
100	        id="nous",
101	        name="Nous Portal",
102	        auth_type="oauth_device_code",
103	        portal_base_url=DEFAULT_NOUS_PORTAL_URL,
104	        inference_base_url=DEFAULT_NOUS_INFERENCE_URL,
105	        client_id=DEFAULT_NOUS_CLIENT_ID,
106	        scope=DEFAULT_NOUS_SCOPE,
107	    ),
108	    "openai-codex": ProviderConfig(
109	        id="openai-codex",
110	        name="OpenAI Codex",
111	        auth_type="oauth_external",
112	        inference_base_url=DEFAULT_CODEX_BASE_URL,
113	    ),
114	    "copilot": ProviderConfig(
115	        id="copilot",
116	        name="GitHub Copilot",
117	        auth_type="api_key",
118	        inference_base_url=DEFAULT_GITHUB_MODELS_BASE_URL,
119	        api_key_env_vars=("COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN", "GH_TOKEN", "GITHUB_TOKEN"),
120	    ),
121	    "copilot-acp": ProviderConfig(
122	        id="copilot-acp",
123	        name="GitHub Copilot ACP",
124	        auth_type="external_process",
125	        inference_base_url=DEFAULT_COPILOT_ACP_BASE_URL,
126	        base_url_env_var="COPILOT_ACP_BASE_URL",
127	    ),
128	    "zai": ProviderConfig(
129	        id="zai",
130	        name="Z.AI / GLM",
131	        auth_type="api_key",
132	        inference_base_url="https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4",
133	        api_key_env_vars=("GLM_API_KEY", "ZAI_API_KEY", "Z_AI_API_KEY"),
134	        base_url_env_var="GLM_BASE_URL",
135	    ),
136	    "kimi-coding": ProviderConfig(
137	        id="kimi-coding",
138	        name="Kimi / Moonshot",
139	        auth_type="api_key",
140	        inference_base_url="https://api.moonshot.ai/v1",
141	        api_key_env_vars=("KIMI_API_KEY",),
142	        base_url_env_var="KIMI_BASE_URL",
143	    ),
144	    "minimax": ProviderConfig(
145	        id="minimax",
146	        name="MiniMax",
147	        auth_type="api_key",
148	        inference_base_url="https://api.minimax.io/anthropic",
149	        api_key_env_vars=("MINIMAX_API_KEY",),
150	        base_url_env_var="MINIMAX_BASE_URL",
